description: Vector-ready code index for packages/opencode - hierarchical multi-level access index

entries.title: Agent System
entries.content: Agent configurations and generation system. Defines different AI agent types with permissions, temperature, and custom prompts. Built-in agents: build (default), plan (no edit tools), explore (codebase exploration), general (subagent). Supports dynamic agent generation via LLM.

entries.title: Authentication System
entries.content: Authentication system supporting OAuth, API key, and well-known auth methods. Manages tokens, credentials, and enterprise URL configurations.

entries.title: Event Bus System
entries.content: Pub/sub event bus for inter-component communication. Supports subscription management, event publishing, and global bus for cross-instance events.

entries.title: CLI & TUI
entries.content: Command-line interface and Terminal UI. Main run command for message handling, session management, tool rendering. TUI built with SolidJS + OpenTUI with theme detection, keyboard handling, dialog system. All CLI commands: run, generate, auth, agent, upgrade, serve, models, stats, export, import, pr, session, db, evolve.

entries.title: Configuration System
entries.content: Hierarchical configuration loading system with multiple precedence levels: remote org defaults, global config, project config, .opencode directory. Supports array concatenation for plugins/instructions. Managed settings for enterprise deployments. Remote config fetching.

entries.title: Evolution System
entries.content: Prompt, skill, and memory evolution over time. Tracks improvements through usage. Store in .opencode/evolution/ directory. Memory evolution extracts learnings via LLM.

entries.title: File Operations
entries.content: File system operations: watching with chokidar, code search via ripgrep, ignore pattern handling, file time utilities.

entries.title: Global Paths
entries.content: XDG-based directory paths: data, cache, config, state, bin, log. Used throughout the application for file storage.

entries.title: IDE Integration
entries.content: IDE detection and extension installation. Supports VSCode, VSCode Insiders, Cursor, VSCodium, Windsurf. Provides install function for OpenCode extension.

entries.title: Self-Learning System
entries.content: Comprehensive AI self-improvement system. Components: LearningScheduler (scheduling), Collector (collects items), Analyzer (evaluates), Installer (applies improvements), KnowledgeStore, NegativeMemory (tracks failures), Archive (snapshots), SelfRefactor (code refactoring), VectorStore (semantic search), HierarchicalMemory (module-level summaries). Uses sqlite-vec for vector embeddings.

entries.title: Language Server Protocol
entries.content: LSP client and server management. Supports 20+ languages: TypeScript/JavaScript, Python, Rust, Go, Java, C/C++, C#, Ruby, PHP, Swift, Kotlin, HTML/CSS, JSON/YAML, Terraform, Docker, Lua, Elixir. Auto-installs language servers.

entries.title: Model Context Protocol
entries.content: MCP server integration. Discovers MCP servers from config, handles OAuth authentication, provides MCP tools to agents. MCP (Model Context Protocol) enables extensible tool capabilities.

entries.title: Permission System
entries.content: Tool permission rules - allow/ask/deny per operation. Next-gen PermissionNext with fine-grained rules. Integrates with agent system for operation control.

entries.title: Plugin System
entries.content: Dynamic plugin loading system. Built-in plugins for auth (Codex, Copilot, GitLab). Hooks system for auth, events, tools, HTTP routes. Plugin recovery manager for auto-restart.

entries.title: Project Management
entries.content: Project entity management. Project: ID, worktree, VCS, name, icon. Instance: current project singleton with context. VCS: version control integration. Bootstrap: project initialization.

entries.title: AI Provider System
entries.content: Multi-provider AI support with 20+ providers: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google (Vertex/Generative AI), Azure, Amazon Bedrock, OpenRouter, GitHub Copilot, GitLab, Cerebras, Groq, Mistral, DeepInfra, Cohere, Cloudflare Workers. Dynamic SDK loading, cost tracking, model selection.

entries.title: Question Tool System
entries.content: Interactive question/answer tool for user input. Supports single and multiple choice questions with descriptions. Manages pending requests, replies, and rejection handling.

entries.title: Session Management
entries.content: Conversation session system. Session: conversation container with message tree, forking support. Message storage with parts (text, tool calls, reasoning). Prompt building with system prompt construction. Tool resolution for AI interactions.

entries.title: Shell Execution
entries.content: Shell command execution using Bun subprocess. Output streaming, environment handling.

entries.title: Skill System
entries.content: Reusable prompt templates (similar to Claude Code skills). Discovery from multiple directories: .claude/skills, .opencode/skills, remote URLs. SKILL.md format with frontmatter parsing.

entries.title: Snapshot System
entries.content: Git-based file versioning. Creates snapshots in separate git repository. Operations: track, restore, revert, diff. Enables file restoration and change tracking.

entries.title: Data Persistence
entries.content: SQLite database with Drizzle ORM. Migration system, sqlite-vec extension for vector search. Generic key-value storage. Performance optimizations: WAL mode, 64MB cache.

entries.title: Tool System
entries.content: Tool definition and registry. Tool.define() factory with Zod parameter validation. Registry loads built-in tools (bash, read, write, edit, glob, grep, webfetch, websearch, codesearch, task, skill, todowrite, memory, plan, question), MCP tools, plugin tools, ZeroClaw tools.

entries.title: Utilities
entries.content: Utility functions: logging (structured with file output), filesystem operations, git operations, glob matching, work queue, file-based locking, timeout utilities, archive/compression, formatting, internationalization.

entries.title: Worktree Management
entries.content: Git worktree-based isolated development environments. Create parallel worktrees with creative names (brave-canyon, cosmic-falcon). Operations: create, remove, reset. Runs start commands after creation.

entries.title: ZeroClaw Sandbox
entries.content: Secure remote execution sandbox. Client for ZeroClaw daemon communication. Tool routing to sandboxed environment. Controller for remote management (updates, restarts, deployment). Security policies: supervised, read-only, full.

entries.title: Main Entry Point
entries.content: CLI entry point using yargs. Registers all commands: run, generate, auth, agent, upgrade, serve, web, models, stats, export, import, github, pr, session, db, evolve, acp, mcp. Handles uncaught exceptions, database migration, MCP cron check.

entries.title: AI Provider Main
entries.content: Main provider system. Loads AI SDKs dynamically via Bun. Supports 20+ providers with custom auth, regions, endpoints. Cost calculation tracks token usage. Model selection with defaultModel, getSmallModel for fallback.

entries.title: AI Chat Loop
entries.content: Core AI chat loop implementation. createUserMessage processes input. loop() implements AI interaction cycle: history retrieval, system prompt building, memory injection, AI model calls, tool execution. resolveTools builds tool list with registry, MCP tools, permissions.

entries.title: Tool Definition
entries.content: Tool factory using Tool.define(id, init). init returns description, parameters (Zod schema), execute function. Automatic output truncation support.

entries.title: Vector Store
entries.content: Vector embedding storage using sqlite-vec. Embedding models: simple, openai, local. Search methods: search (combined), searchVec (cosine distance), searchFallback (text similarity). Sync mechanism for knowledge nodes. Vector types: content, code, constraint, character, scene, style.

entries.title: Database Setup
entries.content: SQLite database initialization. Uses bun:sqlite with Drizzle ORM. Migration system. Loads sqlite-vec extension. Performance PRAGMAs: WAL, synchronous=NORMAL, busy_timeout=5000, cache_size=-64000, foreign_keys=ON.

entries.title: HTTP API Server
entries.content: HTTP API server using Hono framework. Routes: /project, /session, /permission, /provider, /config, /pty, /mcp, /tui. Auth with basic auth, CORS support, SSE for events, webhook support.

entries.title: Plugin Loader
entries.content: Plugin loader with hooks system. Dynamic plugin installation from npm. Internal plugins for auth (Codex, Copilot, GitLab). HTTP route registration from plugins. Plugin recovery manager for auto-restart.

entries.title: Question Tool
entries.content: Interactive question/answer tool. Zod schemas for Option, Info, Request, Answer, Reply. Event publishing for Asked, Replied, Rejected. Pending request state management.

entries.title: Event Bus
entries.content: Pub/sub event bus. Subscriptions map for event handlers. InstanceDisposed event for cleanup. Subscribe to all events via wildcard.

entries.title: IDE Integration
entries.content: IDE detection and extension installation. Supports Windsurf, VSCode Insiders, VSCode, Cursor, VSCodium. InstallFailedError and AlreadyInstalledError for error handling.

migration_notes.existing_schema: node_type, node_id, entity_title, vector_type, embedding, model, dimensions, metadata
